name: GEO-Bench
scope: Generation-stage source visibility over diverse queries
notes: Foundational but abstracts away much of retrieval/reranking.

name: C-SEO Bench
source: C-SEO Bench: Does Conversational SEO Work?
scope: Conversational search across tasks, domains, and adoption rates
notes: Important negative-result benchmark for multi-actor settings.

name: AutoGEO datasets
source: What Generative Search Engines Like and How to Optimize Web Content Cooperatively
scope: Preference-rule extraction and automatic GEO evaluation
notes: Includes GEO-Bench derivative plus e-commerce and Researchy-GEO style datasets/checkpoints.

name: CC-GSEO-Bench
scope: Content-centric source influence in generative search engines
metrics: MIL, ICov, IStab, exposure, faithful credit, causal impact
notes: Useful for moving beyond raw visibility.

name: SAGEO Arena
notes: Code/data not verified in this pass.

name: MSME-GEO-Bench
source: From Experience to Skill: Multi-Agent GEO via Reusable Strategy Learning
scope: Multi-scenario, multi-engine GEO benchmark for reusable strategy learning
metrics: Twin Branch attribution, DSV-CF semantic visibility and attribution fidelity
notes: Official MAGEO benchmark dataset on Hugging Face.

name: E-GEO
source: E-GEO: A Testbed for GEO in E-Commerce
metrics: product visibility and ranking lift under rewriting heuristics
notes: Vertical benchmark for AI shopping/product recommendation style GEO.

name: GEM-Bench
scope: Ad-injected response generation within generative engine marketing
notes: Adjacent monetization benchmark; separate from organic GEO.

name: GEO Citation Lab
source: From Citation Selection to Citation Absorption
scope: AI search trigger, citation source selection, and citation absorption across ChatGPT, Google AI Overview / Gemini, and Perplexity
metrics: search trigger rate, citation width, influence_score, influence_rank, ref_count, paragraph_coverage_ratio, TF-IDF overlap, n-gram overlap, embedding similarity, LLM relevance and content quality, 72 citation-level features
notes: Strong practical measurement resource: 602 prompts, 21,143 search-layer citation rows, 23,745 citation-level feature rows, 18,151 fetched pages. Reuse terms should be checked because no LICENSE was found during inspection.

name: GEO-Bench Ranking Manipulation
source: GEO-Bench: Benchmarking Ranking Manipulation in Generative Engine Optimization
scope: Unified GEO ranking-manipulation benchmark across black-box prompt attacks, white-box gradient attacks, and white-hat C-SEO strategies
metrics: NRG, Success@alpha, Promote@alpha, keyword violation rate, perplexity ratio; five datasets; fixed Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct ranker
notes: Important safety benchmark because it evaluates both attack effectiveness and stealth under one protocol; treat as defensive/detectability resource.
